raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/AssessmentForm.tsx", "issue": "Progress bar depletes in red on error — violates Law 1: NEVER RED.", "recommended_fix": "Change depletion color to purple (#D4B4FF) in ProgressBar component."}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/lib/zeus-client.ts", "issue": "No energy adaptation logic present — Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in all products except MindShift.", "recommended_fix": "Inject energy-throttling middleware that caps assessment length based on user's last 7-day focus score."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", "issue": "Skills endpoint returns full agent list even if user has reduced motion enabled — violates Law 4: ANIMATION SAFETY.", "recommended_fix": "Filter out animated agents when `prefers-reduced-motion` is true."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/BadgeUnlock.tsx", "issue": "Badge reveal uses bounce+rotate+sparkle — violates Law 4: UNLIMITED ANIMATION.", "recommended_fix": "Replace with scale-only entrance, max 1.2x, gentle spring damping ≥14."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/DashboardCTAList.tsx", "issue": "Four filled buttons visible at once — violates Law 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION.", "recommended_fix": "Promote only 'Start Session' to filled; others to ghost buttons."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/i18n/en/strings.json", "issue": "Contains 'You haven't completed your profile' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.", "recommended_fix": "Remove string; replace empty state with 'Ready when you are'."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/CrystalCounter.tsx", "issue": "Counts up over 2s on earn — violates Law 4: UNSAFE COUNT-UP ANIMATION.", "recommended_fix": "Show final value instantly or animate within 800ms."}, {"severity": "LOW", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/AssessmentResultCard.tsx", "issue": "Shows '0 of 5 completed' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.", "recommended_fix": "Replace with 'Start →' when 0, otherwise show '3 completed'."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/skills/behavior-pattern-analyzer.py", "issue": "MindShift-only energy adaptation model — Law 2 not propagated to other skills.", "recommended_fix": "Extract energy-adaptation logic to shared lib, import into all skill runtimes."}, {"severity": "MEDIUM", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Confetti.tsx", "issue": "Emits 50 particles on achievement — violates Law 4: CONFETTI EXCEEDS 12 PARTICLES.", "recommended_fix": "Cap at 12 particles, duration 1.5s, contained within card."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is isolated to MindShift — foundational ecosystem risk."}

findings.issue: Progress bar depletes in red on error — violates Law 1: NEVER RED.
findings.recommended_fix: Change depletion color to purple (#D4B4FF) in ProgressBar component.

findings.issue: No energy adaptation logic present — Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in all products except MindShift.
findings.recommended_fix: Inject energy-throttling middleware that caps assessment length based on user's last 7-day focus score.

findings.issue: Skills endpoint returns full agent list even if user has reduced motion enabled — violates Law 4: ANIMATION SAFETY.
findings.recommended_fix: Filter out animated agents when `prefers-reduced-motion` is true.

findings.issue: Badge reveal uses bounce+rotate+sparkle — violates Law 4: UNLIMITED ANIMATION.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with scale-only entrance, max 1.2x, gentle spring damping ≥14.

findings.issue: Four filled buttons visible at once — violates Law 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION.
findings.recommended_fix: Promote only 'Start Session' to filled; others to ghost buttons.

findings.issue: Contains 'You haven't completed your profile' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove string; replace empty state with 'Ready when you are'.

findings.issue: Counts up over 2s on earn — violates Law 4: UNSAFE COUNT-UP ANIMATION.
findings.recommended_fix: Show final value instantly or animate within 800ms.

findings.issue: Shows '0 of 5 completed' — violates Law 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with 'Start →' when 0, otherwise show '3 completed'.

findings.issue: MindShift-only energy adaptation model — Law 2 not propagated to other skills.
findings.recommended_fix: Extract energy-adaptation logic to shared lib, import into all skill runtimes.

findings.issue: Emits 50 particles on achievement — violates Law 4: CONFETTI EXCEEDS 12 PARTICLES.
findings.recommended_fix: Cap at 12 particles, duration 1.5s, contained within card.

whistleblower_flag: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) is isolated to MindShift — foundational ecosystem risk.
